---
title: "Getting Started in R and RStudio"
institute: "OHSU OCTRI-BERD"
author: "Jessica Minnier, Meike Niederhausen"
date: "04/30/2026"
---



**Welcome to the BERD workshop *Getting Started in R and RStudio*!**

-   Part 1: Thursday, April 30, 2:00 to 3:30 p.m.
-   Part 2 : Monday, May 11 , 2:00 to 3:30 p.m.

See the [About](about.qmd) page for information about the workshop.


-   [R & RStudio installation instructions](https://ohsu-octri-berd.github.io/R_RStudio_Installation/){target="_blank"}


# Open files for today's workshop

1.  Download zipped **folder** of workshop files using link on website
    -   **Do you have a PC? Need to right click the  .zip file and select EXTRACT ALL**
    -   Do you have a Mac? Just double click the .zip file and it will extract the files automatically.
    -   These files are hosted on [github](https://github.com/OHSU-OCTRI-BERD/R_Intro_BERD_2026_04){target="_blank"} 

2.  [**Open RStudio by double-clicking on the file**]{style="color:darkorange"} `R_code_Intro_BERD_2026_04.Rproj` that is in the unzipped folder you downloaded.
    -   *If you already you RStudio open, this will open a new independent session of RStudio.* 

3.  Want to view the slides on your own computer? 
    -   You have two options.
        1.    The "slide" view that will be presented during the workshop ([link](slides_R_berd_2026.qmd){target="_blank"})
        2.    Or, view the slides' content as a webpage ([link](slides_html_R_berd_2026.qmd){target="_blank"})

4.  If you want to post questions outside of the chat (such as to include screenshots), use this [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1oThowPaGP32-iheXAZwJHYgZHgTJRLsQv-zrUkp5KJA/edit?usp=sharing){target="_blank"}.
